memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Duke of Saxony, 1059.  Fought with his brother-in-law, Magnus I of Norway, against the Wends.

zh.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen是?和?的兒子，於1020年2月1日出生在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維。他於1042年11月與Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway在德國薩辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1072年3月28日在德國尼德薩辛盧包格享年52歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 迪波爾迪斯瓦爾德吉普多福桑可特 米氏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen是?和?的儿子，于1020年2月1日出生在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維。他于1042年11月与Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway在德国薩辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1072年3月28日在德国尼德薩辛盧包格享年52岁，埋葬在德国薩辛可萊斯 迪波爾迪斯瓦爾德吉普多福桑可特 米氏。

nameMeanings.name: Billung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Billing, derived from Old English bil ‘sword’, or a habitational name from Great and Little Billing in Northamptonshire, meaning ‘(settlement of) the followers (Old English -ingas) of a man called Bill(a) or Bȳdel’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, formed with a cognate of Old Saxon bīl ‘sword’.
Danish and Norwegian: from an Old Danish personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Billings
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Billing , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belling
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Belling, in Pomerania, Baden, Hesse, Thuringia, and elsewhere.

English (Devon): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Belling, Beling, of uncertain origin (perhaps from Old English Bǣdling, an original nickname from bǣdling ‘effeminate man’). Alternatively, a variant of Billing .

variants.name: Billinger
meanings: German: from the personal name   Billing   2.

en.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen was born on 1 February 1020, in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany as the son of ? and ?. He married Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway in November 1042, in Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 March 1072, in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 52, and was buried in Sankt Michaelis, Kipsdorf, Kreis Dippoldiswalde, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen est né le 1 février 1020, à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, fils de ? et ?. Il a épousé Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway en novembre 1042, à Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1072, à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Sankt Michaelis, Kipsdorf, Kreis Dippoldiswalde, Sachsen, Allemagne.

Er hat im November 1042 in Sachsen, Deutschland Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. ja.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsenは1020年2月1日にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグで?と?の息子として生まれた。1042年11月にドイツサチセンでWulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1072年3月28日にドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグで52歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンクレイス ディップオルディスワルドキプスドルフサンクト ミチャエリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen(은)는 1020년 2월 1일 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에서 ?(와)과 ?의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1042년 11월 독일 작센에서 Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1072년 3월 28일 독일 니더작센 u니버그에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 디포디스월드 키프즈도르프 산k트 믹하얼이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1020, em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha filho de ? e ?. Ele casou-se com Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway em novembro de 1042, em Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1072, em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Sankt Michaelis, Kipsdorf, Kreis Dippoldiswalde, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen родился 1 февраля 1020 г. в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия. Его родителей звали ? и ?. Он женился на женщине по имени Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway ноябрь 1042 г. в местности сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 марта 1072 г. в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности санкт мачаелис, кипсдорф, крис диппольдисвалд, сачсен, Германия.
